Je charakteristická stupněm krytí IP68, díky čemuž je schopná odolávat nepříznivým vlivům okolního prostředí. items.raw_desc: Katonai kés ANV Knives M050 CMS:Versatility and durability are the main advantages of the incredible M050 CMS EDC military knife. From opening boxes to self-defense, the elmax M050CMS has your back. The M050 is designed to be worn almost anywhere. Thanks to its ultra-low profile, compact size and self-locking handmade kydex case, you can take it with you anytime, anywhere. The M050 offers plenty of room for a large gloved hand, yet is no longer than a regular pencil. The end of the handle is fitted with a hexagonal hole for operating a standard ¼" hex bit. With two compartments in the handle, you can carry multiple hex bits or any other thing you need. The M050 comes standard with a MOLLE clip attached to the holster and two hexagonal bits in the handle.
